# Weekly Routine Planner Template

This is a weekly timetable showing your recurring routine. In **read mode**, you can:
- **Drag on empty cells** to create new time blocks
- **Drag events** to move them to different times/days
- **Drag the bottom edge** of events to resize them

## Timetable View

```dataviewjs
await dv.view("5. Dev/weeklyTimetable", {})
```
